logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: koi notifications hai Dm " initialized.

result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aap `DM_Monitor_Pro` agent ke updates pooch rahe ho. Iske liye, mujhe **Skill: Agent Follow-Up & Coordination** ke andar maujood **Tool: get_agent_output** ka use karna hoga. Yeh tool mujhe us agent ki latest memory aur findings dikhayega.

Confirm karu ki main `get_agent_output` tool use karun for `DM_Monitor_Pro`?
